calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-20-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-20-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Plaintiff:Janet Molinari, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Robert Prisant.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1030 Cabrillo St. (1st bedroom on right), San Francisco.
Past-due Rent $600.00
Holdover Damages $340.00
No Costs, for a Total of $940.00
Plaintiff to prepare Judgment.

10:30 A.M.
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-09-2007 Continued To Aug-20-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion, Motion Memorandum Of P/A And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Continue Trial
Off Calendar Aug-09-2007 Text Ruling

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-08-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk K. Shaw, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Janet Molinari is present and appearing In Propria Persona.

Defendant Robert Prisamt is present.
Lori Sicard representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date remains set.
